2. Should the Fate Wheel Be Publicly Visible, or Should It Be Spun in Secret?

✔ Ex: Should the class watch the wheel spin, or should it be revealed after the fact?

3. Should There Be a Unique Archetype Only One Player Can Claim Per Class?

✔ Ex: A single, extremely rare role that is first-come, first-served?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.6. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 8.7 – Finalizing Familiars, Fate Wheel, Unique Archetype, & Character Alteration Rituals


🚀 This iteration locks in familiars as permanent, makes the Fate Wheel a public spectacle, introduces a rare unique archetype per class, and establishes a one-time ritual for deep character changes.

📜 1. Familiars Are Soul-Bound & Cannot Be Changed
